title: heliocereus × capelleanus
intro: Heliocereus × capelleanus, also known as the Capella cactus, is a hybrid of the Heliocereus and Strophocactus species, producing vibrant flowers. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful for treating wounds and reducing pain. The health benefits of Heliocereus × capelleanus include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal supplements, teas, or topical creams, but its safe use and preparation require further research and caution.
